runTitle: v8.12.10 H-5 semantic router fail-closed production QA
coveredSurfaces: Cloud Run AI supervisor stream v2 - high-confidence semantic monitoring frame provider miss
Semantic router v2 - deterministic fail-closed response policy
Monitoring evidence guard - unsupported metric avoids LLM hallucinated numeric answer

plannerShadowObservations.source: direct Cloud Run smoke script; responsePolicy deterministic_fail_closed

expertAssessments.rationale: H-5의 핵심 수용 기준인 high-confidence semantic frame provider miss가 deterministic fail-closed로 처리되고, trace에 semantic_frame_provider_miss 및 semantic_frame_fail_closed가 남는 것을 production Cloud Run에서 확인했다.
GitLab CI release pipeline과 Cloud Run health/traffic/version 검증이 통과했고 free-tier runtime limits 및 Cloud Build machineType guard가 유지됐다.

usageChecks.summary: v8.12.10 deployed by GitLab pipeline 2546194670. Cloud Run /health reported 8.12.10; revision ai-engine-00512-zwf has 100% traffic and limits cpu=1 memory=512Mi. Latest Cloud Build c33b7a8e-9027-489a-84e5-a5c59ed731fd succeeded with no custom machineType.
usageChecks.evidence: gcloud run services describe ai-engine; gcloud builds list --limit=5

usageChecks.summary: H-5 production smoke used direct Cloud Run API with injected semantic intentFrame. The response was deterministic provider=monitoring-evidence-unavailable, toolsCalled=monitoring-evidence-unavailable, and did not require LLM retries, Supabase writes, or Redis session storage.

artifacts.label: H-5 fail-closed smoke result
artifacts.note: Direct Cloud Run supervisor stream response with deterministic monitoring-evidence-unavailable fail-closed trace.

links.label: Cloud Run AI Engine health v8.12.10
